snippetLines.lineText: /** A class that groups services in the scope of the action. Like the FileOutErr object. */
public class ActionExecutionContext implements Closeable, ActionContext.ActionContextRegistry {
/** Determines whether to read/write remote cache, disk cache or both. */
* This exception gets thrown if {@link Action#execute(ActionExecutionContext)} is unsuccessful.
* Typically these are re-raised ExecException throwables.
AbstractAction action, ActionExecutionContext ctx, TemplateMetadata templateMetadata)
Artifact jdepsFile, ActionExecutionContext actionExecutionContext) throws IOException {
// Copy once here, instead of on every construction of ActionExecutionContext.

// Real action execution would happen here.

* they both provide services to actions being executed and are passed to almost the same places.
